title: Gnidimacrin derivatives as potent hiv-1 inhibitors and latency reversing agents
abstract: Gnidimacrin derivatives, daphneodorins isolated from Daphne odora , and daphnane diterpenes isolated from Daphne genkwa and methods of their use for activating latent HIV-1 replication and inhibiting HIV-1 infection are disclosed.
claims:
